title: MuSig
description: MuSig aggregates multiple participants' public keys and partial signatures into one Schnorr key and one Schnorr signature. It preserves single-signature-looking on-chain spends while requiring interactive coordination between the signers.

resources.title: MuSig
resources.notes: Step-by-step teaching walkthrough of MuSig key aggregation, signing rounds, and the resulting single-signature spend.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: MuSig
resources.notes: Bitcoin-focused overview of MuSig, MuSig2, and the tradeoffs between privacy, efficiency, and interactivity.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts: MuSig, MuSig-DN and MuSig2
resources.notes: Deeper discussion of the MuSig family and the practical differences between the protocol variants.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for Taproot-era keys, transaction construction, and multisignature design tradeoffs.
